scope: deterministic validators, converters, profiles, adapters, CI, and release artifacts
claimsBoundary: This register does not certify policy, legal, clinical, funding, or external-service correctness.

risks.control: Path-constrained extraction and hostile path tests
Archive, member-count, byte, depth, and runtime budgets
risks.verification: Phase 1 baseline and Phase 2 resource-limit tests

risks.control: Bounded structured-data validation and deterministic failure diagnostics
Structured output and hostile-string regression corpus
risks.verification: Phase 2 hostile-input tests and report review

risks.control: Pinned source revisions/digests; no implicit remote dereference
risks.verification: Source manifests, authority model, and release audit

risks.control: Fail-closed unknown revisions and migration tests
risks.verification: Compatibility matrices and contract test suite

risks.control: Human/official source assertion review with effective dates
risks.verification: PIC and process-profile human certification packets

risks.control: Candidate-only fixture paths and independent oracle review
Locked dependencies, immutable action pins, least privilege, and scans
risks.verification: Phase 3 workflow/dependency audit and hosted CI evidence

risks.control: Secret scanning, synthetic fixtures, and artifact review
risks.verification: CI security jobs and release artifact inspection

risks.control: Optional isolated adapters with explicit projection loss
Immutable commit, checksums, SBOM, provenance, and clean-build comparison
risks.verification: v1 release candidate audit and hosted release evidence
